announcement: Thanks for visiting HartfordWorkshop! Small handmade gifts and volunteer thank-you boxes, made in Hartford CT. A portion of sales supports Hartford Foster Futures.
digital_sale_message: No digital items in this shop
policy_payment: Payment via Etsy's secure checkout, including credit and debit cards.
policy_refunds: 30-day return policy on unopened items. Message me if anything arrives damaged.
policy_shipping: Made-to-order items ship within 1-3 business days from Hartford CT via USPS.
sale_message: Thank you for your order! I hope it brings a little Hartford warmth your way.
title: Small Handmade Gifts & HFF Volunteer Thank-You Boxes • Hartford CT
